mapper.sql: id, username, outer_order_no, certify_id, cert_name_ciphertext, cert_no_ciphertext, status, material_info_url, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO identity_verification (username, outer_order_no, certify_id, cert_name_ciphertext, cert_no_ciphertext, status, material_info_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{outerOrderNo}, #{certifyId}, #{certNameCiphertext}, #{certNoCiphertext}, #{status}, #{materialInfoUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM identity_verification WHERE certify_id = #{certifyId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM identity_verification WHERE outer_order_no = #{outerOrderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM identity_verification WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 'PASSED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
